treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient experienced persistent diarrhea and altered mental status post-surgery.

treatment_timeline.event: Laparoscopic cholecystectomy performed for acute on chronic gangrenous cholecystitis.
Patient discharged after surgery with complications.
Patient sent to nursing home after uneventful rehab.
Patient seen by new physician for ongoing RUQ abdominal pain.
Patient sent to emergency department due to persistent abdominal pain.

patient_outcome.final_status: Patient is alert and oriented to person and place, but largely wheelchair bound.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Patient to check INR daily until therapeutic.
patient_outcome.complications: Persistent diarrhea and altered mental status post-surgery.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient has been tolerating oral intake.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Pain has fluctuated, with some days being better and others worse.
